topics: Forms of Learning - Supervised and Unsupervised Learning
Overview of Deep Learning: Deep Feedforward Networks and Training Deep Models
Optimization Techniques: Gradient Descent, GD with Momentum, Stochastic GD, AdaGrad, RMSProp, and Adam
Regularization Methods: L1 and L2, Early Stopping, Dataset Augmentation, Parameter Sharing and Tying, Input Noise Injection, Ensemble Methods, Dropout, and Parameter Initialization
Convolutional Neural Networks: Convolution Layer, Pooling Layer, Fully Connected Layer, and ConvNet
Case Study of ImageNet Challenge: LeNet, AlexNet, GoogLeNet, ResNet, InceptionNet, and EfficientNet
Data Augmentation: Zooming, Rotation, Cropping, Blurring, and Noise Addition
Transfer Learning: Freezing the Input Layers and Fine-Tuning Output Layers
Autoencoders: Standard, Sparse, Denoising, Contractive, and Variational Autoencoders
Suggestions on Project Topics: Applications of Deep Learning to Computer Vision and NLP
